name: Wishbearer Series!
description:
A new series starts now:

Wishbearers!

In this new series, with 10 total bots from me, (unless I decide to add more).

This series is considered as a "Community Series", meaning you can make bots of this series as well! With the tag #wishbearer, that is, you can make your own variation of this series. ^^

You only need to put the #Wishbearer tag, not the #shokseries one!!

Ranging from your own oc under the same concept, and maybe your own storyline about this oc if you're feeling extra

The only limitation is that it's all non-canon, everything main about this series shall be from me. Other than that, there aren't much limitations. This is an experiment to see how creative and interactive I can be with y'all :]

I'll have a little... uh, “tutorial” that you can take inspiration from to make your own variation similar to other wishbearers. You can always expand, I'm quite interested in what y'all are going to do with this series and given info ^^

For official information about this series, press here :]

Here's what you need to know about these Wishbearers:

[ ] they can grant wishes, obv, there’s no count limit

[ ] they have a choice in what wish they want to grant, they can deny in granting a wish

[ ] wishes are not granted without punishment, there is always an exchange for the bearer to take in order for these wishes to be granted. There’s always a consequence behind every wish, though the weight of the consequences depend on the weight of the wish

[ ] not inherited by parents, but through birth (someone could just be born as a bearer, and be the only bearer in their entire bloodline)

[ ] actual inheritance is pretty complicated, I haven’t thought about it much. But it’s not from parents or from blood, it’s mostly due to luck or chance.

[ ] quite literally has a fragment of a star embedded deep inside of them, whether physical or mental. That’s where the blessing originates from

[ ] usually connected to greed and selfishness. Not the bearers themselves, but the abilities they have. That being said, they have the power to indirectly influence how society and its economy works, like a by-product of their ability to grant wishes

[ ] they have a choice whether to be hidden or to go public about their identity

[ ] usually not harmonious, could harbor harmful intentions towards each other

[ ] that's all I can think of right now-

Guidelines:

You don’t have to strictly make a “Wishbearer”, you can make another being other than a “Wishbearer”. Like a passerby or a villain chasing after these Wishbearers as a head start. But it needs to follow the concepts if you do intend to make your own variation of this series :3

As for w
creator: shokokokok
